concerns.text: FR-004 and US-3 require a rule-based score based on 'sentiment alignment' (per Plan Complexity Tracking), but T026 defines the rule-based score logic based on 'keyword presence'. This contradicts the Plan's explicit rejection of 'keyword tautology' and leaves the FR-004 requirement for a sentiment-based metric unimplemented.

FR-005 and SC-001 require aggregating Judge and rule-based scores into a single 'Consistency Score' artifact. No task exists to implement the aggregation logic or write this combined score to the results artifact; T025 and T026 only produce separate scores.

SC-003 requires measuring total execution time against the 6-hour CI limit. No task exists to instrument the `experiment_runner` or `stats_engine` to capture, log, and report the total wall-clock time of the full experiment run.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires datasets to be checksummed and the checksum recorded. T009a creates `human_annotations.json` but no task exists to generate the checksum and record it in the state file as required.
T033 and T033a are duplicate tasks describing the exact same implementation of `run_statistical_test` writing to `stats_results.json`. One should be removed to avoid redundant work and confusion.
